mission.title: argo-workflows: Artifact Garbage Collection
mission.description: Artifact Garbage Collection. Requested by 29+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-workflows deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
helm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-workflows installation.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
When a Workflow is deleted, we should consider garbage collecting artifacts from those workflows where possible.  This should likely be configurable.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Artifact Garbage Collection
steps.description:
Adds support for deletion of GCS objects. Addresses #3102. Will add deletion capability to other drivers in later PRs. 
Tested with https://github.com/fsouza/fake-gcs-server but tests were removed prior to PR creation since this test would mean a dependency on "fake-gcs-server"
```yaml
# The rest of the output config was omitted
  outputs:
    artifacts:
    - name: my-output-artifact
      artifactGC:
        strategy: Never | OnWorkflowDeletion | OnWorkflowArchival
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Artifact Garbage Collection" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Implemented artifact garbage collection with configurable strategies (Never, OnWorkflowDeletion, OnWorkflowArchival). When a workflow is deleted or archived, associated artifacts in object storage are automatically cleaned up.
codeSnippets:
# The rest of the output config was omitted
  outputs:
    artifacts:
    - name: my-output-artifact
      artifactGC:
        strategy: Never | OnWorkflowDeletion | OnWorkflowArchival

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
